raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Oasis Technology, Inc. received $2 million in tax credits to expand its workforce by 357 full-time employees.",
    "The California Competes Tax Credit program was created to ensure the creation of new jobs rather than merely relocating existing ones.",
    "The California Competes program provides incentives to businesses that are locating or expanding in California.",
    "The program offers sales tax relief on the purchase of research and development equipment for life sciences and manufacturing equipment.",
    "The amount of tax credits available through the California Competes program will increase each year until 2018.",
    "Twenty-five percent of the credits available in the California Competes program are reserved for small businesses.",
    "Over $20 million in tax credits were awarded to California businesses in the 2013-14 fiscal year.",
    "Over $150 million will be available in tax credits for the 2014-15 fiscal year."
  ]
}
```
